team.name: asset_management
team.header: Team dedicated to managing Elexion's assets
team.purpose: Handling and discussing all matters related to the lifecycle of Elexion’s assets

team.name: cross_departmental
team.purpose: Facilitating cross-departmental workflow planning and reviews

channel.name: workflow_review
channel.header: Discussion and review of workflow related to assets
channel.purpose: To streamline and optimize the management of assets

channel.name: collaboration_log_review
channel.purpose: To track and improve interdepartmental collaboration

post.message: Hello team, just finished compiling the data from our internal collaboration logs for this year. Between April 1 and December 31, 2025, we conducted 18 cross-departmental workflow planning reviews. This shows a significant increase in our interdepartmental collaboration efforts. Let's keep up the good work!
Hi team, our monthly asset inventory check is coming up next week. Please prepare your respective areas for the review.
Hey everyone, quick reminder about the interdepartmental meeting this Friday. We will be discussing the Q2 project pipelines. Make sure to review the shared documents beforehand.
Thanks, Olivia. IT assets have been audited and we've updated the software licenses. We're ready for the inventory check.
John, could we also review the Customer Satisfaction Survey results in the meeting? It would be beneficial for product development strategies.
Understood, Olivia. The production team will make sure all equipment is accounted for and in good condition.
Good idea, Olivia. We've been working on updating our CRM system, and the customer feedback would be very useful for the new features we're implementing.
Great to hear, Jane and John. Let's aim for a smooth asset review. Reach out if you need any assistance.
Absolutely, Olivia. I've added the survey review to the meeting agenda. See you all on Friday.
